description: A sleek, 'Stock Ticker' style section. Features a horizontal scrolling list of crop prices (e.g., Wheat - ₹2,125 ▲ 2%). Below the ticker, a detailed ui/table.tsx showing top 5 local Mandis. Use bright Green for price increases and Red for decreases. High-contrast typography is used to ensure price data is legible even in bright sunlight.
